projectDescription: An agentic AI platform for healthcare that automates patient intake, clinical documentation, billing, and health tracking for both clinics and patients.
keyFeatures: AI Receptionist — 24/7 call handling, appointment scheduling, and insurance verification
AI Scribe — Real-time ambient transcription and SOAP note generation
AI Medical Coder — Automated ICD/CPT code extraction and validation
Clinical Insights AI — Differential diagnosis suggestions and patient data analysis
Charting AI — Automated EHR-ready clinical documentation
Nursing AI — Patient intake, vitals review, and care coordination
Health Chronicler — Continuous wearable and device data aggregation for patients
Pre-Assessment AI — Pre-visit symptom collection and structured health reports
Post-visit plain-English translation of doctor notes for patients
HIPAA-compliant, SOC 2 Type II certified, AWS Bedrock-powered infrastructure
publicApiSurface: Wearable / Apple Health / Google Fit sync (Health Chronicler)
Clinical notes and SOAP note generation
Medical code extraction (ICD/CPT via Coder AI)
Clinical insights and differential diagnosis reports
Clinic dashboard — patient flow, staff schedules, wait times
